20.reason: [The error is not in the source code but in the test environment: the Java compiler (javac) is not found, preventing compilation and execution of the program.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The error is not in the source code but in the test environment: the Java compiler (javac) is not found, preventing compilation and execution of the program.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The program assumes the file "testfile.txt" exists and is readable. If the file is missing or the path is incorrect, a FileNotFoundException (subclass of IOException) will be thrown, causing the program to crash without producing any output (neither lexer.txt nor error.txt). This matches the test case where no output was generated.]

261.reason: Incorrect token type: single '&' should not be classified as AND (&&). The error is recorded but the returned token type is wrong.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Incorrect token type: single '&' should not be classified as AND (&&). The error is recorded but the returned token type is wrong.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  Incorrect token type assignment. According to the token category table, TokenType.AND is strictly reserved for "&&". A single "&" is a lexical error and should not be assigned the AND token type.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Incorrectly assigns TokenType.AND (reserved for '&&') to a single '&', which is a lexical error and violates the token category definitions.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect token type: single '&' should not be assigned TokenType.AND; this causes incorrect output even when an error is reported]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect token type: single '&' should not be assigned TokenType.AND; this causes incorrect output even after error detection]

273.reason: Incorrect token type: single '|' should not be classified as OR (||). The error is recorded but the returned token type is wrong.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Incorrect token type: single '|' should not be classified as OR (||). The error is recorded but the returned token type is wrong.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  Incorrect token type assignment. According to the token category table, TokenType.OR is strictly reserved for "||". A single "|" is a lexical error and should not be assigned the OR token type.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Incorrectly assigns TokenType.OR (reserved for '||') to a single '|', which is a lexical error and violates the token category definitions.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect token type: single '|' should not be assigned TokenType.OR; this causes incorrect output even when an error is reported]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect token type: single '|' should not be assigned TokenType.OR; this causes incorrect output even after error detection]
